commands.review_summary:
The PR restores a plugin-owned 48-model OpenCode Zen fallback and live catalog, dynamic model resolution, family-specific transport normalization, manifest metadata, and focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +1617, Tests +350. Total +1967 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level with high confidence: current main and v2026.6.6 expose OpenCode Zen authentication but omit the previously shipped catalog and dynamic-resolution path. This read-only review did not execute a credentialed failing request.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The code-level routing defect is resolved; maintainers should now require contributor-supplied credentialed provider proof and decide whether to own the full durable fallback catalog before merge.

target.title: fix(opencode): restore Zen model catalog
target.body:
## Summary

- Restore a plugin-owned OpenCode Zen model catalog for the bundled `opencode` provider.
- Add static fallback rows for the 48 models currently advertised by the public Zen model endpoint, plus runtime live discovery for `/zen/v1/models`.
- Restore dynamic model resolution, catalog augmentation, family-specific transport routing, and manifest metadata for manifest-first flows.

Fixes #92479

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** The bundled `opencode` Zen provider exposed auth/setup but did not expose a model catalog or dynamic model resolver, so `opencode/<model>` selections failed as unknown or unavailable. This patch restores the provider-owned Zen catalog, keeps a 48-row durable fallback visible when live discovery is unavailable, and routes model families through the expected Zen adapters.

**Real environment tested:** Linux, Node 22.22.0, pnpm 11.2.2, local OpenClaw checkout at PR head `e5497442`. No real OpenCode credentials or external model completions were used; public unauthenticated model discovery and local CLI fallback listing were exercised.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```bash
curl -fsSL https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/models
OPENCODE_API_KEY=dummy corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . openclaw models list --provider opencode --json
corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . test extensions/opencode/index.test.ts
corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . exec oxlint extensions/opencode/index.ts extensions/opencode/provider-catalog.ts extensions/opencode/index.test.ts
corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . plugins:inventory:check
git diff --check
```

**Evidence after fix:** Public Zen endpoint returned 48 model IDs, and the patched CLI fallback catalog exposed 48 `opencode` rows after live discovery timed out locally:

```text
Public endpoint model IDs observed: 48
claude-fable-5
claude-opus-4-8
claude-opus-4-7
claude-opus-4-6
claude-opus-4-5
claude-opus-4-1
claude-sonnet-4-6
claude-sonnet-4-5
claude-sonnet-4
claude-haiku-4-5
gemini-3.5-flash
gemini-3.1-pro
gemini-3-flash
gpt-5.5
gpt-5.5-pro
gpt-5.4
gpt-5.4-pro
gpt-5.4-mini
gpt-5.4-nano
gpt-5.3-codex-spark
gpt-5.3-codex
gpt-5.2
gpt-5.2-codex
gpt-5.1
gpt-5.1-codex-max
gpt-5.1-codex
gpt-5.1-codex-mini
gpt-5
gpt-5-codex
gpt-5-nano
grok-build-0.1
deepseek-v4-pro
deepseek-v4-flash
glm-5.1
glm-5
minimax-m2.7
minimax-m2.5
kimi-k2.6
kimi-k2.5
qwen3.6-plus
qwen3.5-plus
big-pickle
deepseek-v4-flash-free
mimo-v2.5-free
qwen3.6-plus-free
minimax-m3-free
nemotron-3-ultra-free
north-mini-code-free

$ OPENCODE_API_KEY=dummy corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . openclaw models list --provider opencode --json
{
  "provider": "opencode",
  "count": 48,
  "models": [
    { "id": "claude-fable-5", "provider": "opencode" },
    { "id": "claude-opus-4-8", "provider": "opencode" },
    ...
    { "id": "qwen3.6-plus", "provider": "opencode" },
    { "id": "qwen3.6-plus-free", "provider": "opencode" },
    { "id": "minimax-m3-free", "provider": "opencode" },
    { "id": "north-mini-code-free", "provider": "opencode" }
  ]
}
```

Focused regression coverage now asserts family routing for Claude, GPT, Gemini, MiniMax, and Qwen in both runtime model resolution and manifest metadata:

```text
claude-opus-4-6 -> anthropic-messages @ https://opencode.ai/zen
gpt-5.5 -> openai-responses @ https://opencode.ai/zen/v1
gemini-3.5-flash -> google-generative-ai @ https://opencode.ai/zen/v1
minimax-m2.7 -> openai-completions @ https://opencode.ai/zen/v1
qwen3.6-plus -> anthropic-messages @ https://opencode.ai/zen
```

Verification output:

```text
$ corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . test extensions/opencode/index.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  10 passed (10)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 26.65s

$ corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . exec oxlint extensions/opencode/index.ts extensions/opencode/provider-catalog.ts extensions/opencode/index.test.ts
# no output

$ corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . plugins:inventory:check
$ node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check

$ git diff --check
# no output
```

**Observed result after fix:** `opencode` now has a durable 48-model catalog in plugin runtime and manifest metadata. The CLI can list the provider fallback catalog locally, and tests verify dynamic resolution plus corrected family-specific transport/base URL routing for MiniMax and Qwen.

**What was not tested:** Real OpenCode credentials, authenticated live discovery, and live model completions were not run in this environment. The proof covers public endpoint discovery, local fallback catalog visibility, manifest metadata, and transport-routing regression tests.
